backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the CampusVoice backend, implementing complaint management, department handling, and user profile CRUD with role-based access control via a mixin authorization system.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that seeds a predefined list of 30+ academic departments into the departments map on canister upgrade, preserving existing complaints and user profiles.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the department dropdown update feature (for complaint form and profile modal) to its relevant frontend files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing short summaries of all frontend source files, describing each component's purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme design tokens including colors, borders, charts, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the CampusVoice AI React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app shell managing authentication state, role-based routing across all views (dashboard, complaints, analytics, departments, etc.), and conditional rendering of login flows, profile setup, and the main layout with sidebar and header.
frontend/src/components/AdminLoginFlow.t: A login page for the admin role that uses Internet Identity authentication, displaying admin-specific benefits and storing the pending role in localStorage before login.
frontend/src/components/AIChatbot.tsx: A floating AI chatbot widget that lets users send messages and receive responses via the Gemini service, with text-to-speech support for assistant messages.
frontend/src/components/AppHeader.tsx: The sticky top navigation header showing the app logo, role-based emergency alert button, notification bell with dropdown, and a user menu with logout and delete account options.
frontend/src/components/AppSidebar.tsx: A role-aware sidebar navigation component that renders different nav items for student, staff, HOD, and admin roles, along with logout and delete account actions.
frontend/src/components/ComplaintCard.ts: A card component that displays a single complaint's status, priority, description, media attachments, and overdue state, with role-sensitive student name display and optional status update actions.
frontend/src/components/DeleteAccountDia: An alert dialog component that handles permanent account deletion by calling the delete mutation, clearing user-specific localStorage keys, invalidating the React Query cache, and logging the user out.
frontend/src/components/DeleteDepartment: An alert dialog component that confirms and executes department deletion via the useDeleteDepartment mutation, showing a loading state and toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/components/DepartmentFormDi: A dialog form component for creating or editing a department, using useCreateDepartment and useUpdateDepartment mutations with name and description fields.
frontend/src/components/EmergencyAlertOv: A full-screen overlay component that displays an active emergency alert with details (student, location, time, department), plays a siren sound for HOD/admin/staff roles, and allows acknowledgment to dismiss it.
frontend/src/components/FeedbackForm.tsx: A star-rating feedback form component that lets students rate and comment on complaint resolutions, persisting the feedback locally via updateLocalMeta and supporting a read-only display mode.
frontend/src/components/HODLoginFlow.tsx: A login page component for the Head of Department role that stores a pending role in localStorage and triggers Internet Identity authentication, displaying HOD-specific feature benefits.
frontend/src/components/MediaUploader.ts: A React component that allows users to upload photos, videos, and audio files, converting them to data URLs and displaying previews in a grid with remove functionality.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog for new users to complete their profile setup by entering name, email, role, and department, then saving via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/StaffLoginFlow.t: A login page for staff users that sets a pending role in localStorage and triggers Internet Identity authentication, displaying staff-specific feature benefits.
frontend/src/components/StudentLoginFlow: A login page for student users that sets a pending role in localStorage and triggers Internet Identity authentication, displaying student-specific feature benefits.
frontend/src/constants/appRoles.ts: Defines the CampusRole type and provides label and color mappings for the four campus roles: student, staff, hod, and admin.
frontend/src/constants/complaintCategori: Defines all complaint categories grouped by domain (Academic, Infrastructure, etc.), sensitive category flags, and a deprecated static departments list replaced by a backend-driven hook.
frontend/src/contexts/AppContext.tsx: Defines the global AppContext provider that aggregates authentication state, user profile (with campus role/department), notifications, and emergency alerts, polling local storage every 5 seconds and auto-surfacing unacknowledged emergencies for privileged roles.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated (or anonymous) ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing access control with an admin token and invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/clear functions and status flags through a React context provider and corresponding hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profile CRUD, complaint creation/status updates, and department queries, each gated on actor and identity availability.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines a campus-themed CSS variable palette (teal/navy) for both light and dark modes along with utility component classes for status badges, priority indicators, and sidebar navigation.
frontend/src/lib/audioService.ts: Web Audio API service that provides functions to play a confirmation beep, a looping emergency siren of configurable duration, and stop all audio by closing the shared AudioContext.
frontend/src/lib/complaintHelpers.ts: Utility functions for complaints including generating unique IDs, computing SLA deadlines based on priority (1/3/7 days), formatting dates, and checking if a complaint is overdue.
frontend/src/lib/geminiService.ts: Provides functions to interact with the Gemini 2.0 Flash API, including complaint text analysis, image analysis, and chatbot responses using a dynamically resolved API key.
frontend/src/lib/localComplaintStore.ts: Manages localStorage persistence for complaint metadata, emergency alerts, and notifications, extending the ICP backend with campus-specific fields.
frontend/src/lib/reportGenerator.ts: Exports complaint data as downloadable JSON or CSV files, including status/priority summaries and formatted complaint details.
frontend/src/lib/userProfileHelpers.ts: Encodes and decodes extended campus user profiles (role, department, departmentId) into a pipe-delimited string format for storage in the ICP backend.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AnalyticsPage.tsx: Displays complaint analytics (status, priority, monthly trends) via Recharts charts with role-based filtering, AI-powered predictive analysis, and JSON export functionality.
frontend/src/pages/ChatbotPage.tsx: A simple page that directs users to the floating AI chatbot widget in the bottom-right corner of the screen.
frontend/src/pages/ComplaintsListPage.ts: Displays a filterable, searchable list of complaints with role-based visibility (admin/HOD/staff), supports status updates, and exports the filtered list as a CSV file.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Role-aware dashboard showing complaint statistics (registered, in-progress, resolved, high-priority) with quick-action navigation buttons tailored to student, staff, HOD, and admin roles.
frontend/src/pages/DepartmentManagementP: Admin page for listing, creating, editing, and deleting academic departments, with summary stats showing total departments and HOD assignment status.
frontend/src/pages/EmergencyLogsPage.tsx: Displays locally stored emergency alerts with options to acknowledge individual alerts or clear all logs, reflecting counts in the app notification system.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Public landing page presenting role-based login entry points (Student, HOD, Staff, Admin) alongside a feature highlights section and a campus background hero image.
frontend/src/pages/SubmitComplaintPage.t: React page component for submitting campus complaints, featuring AI-assisted category/priority analysis via Gemini, media uploads, department selection, anonymous submission toggle, and form validation before calling the backend create complaint mutation.
frontend/src/pages/TrackComplaintsPage.t: React page that lists the current user's submitted complaints with search/status filtering, CSV export, and a detail dialog showing media attachments, status badges, and a feedback form.
frontend/src/pages/UserManagementPage.ts: Placeholder admin page for user management that displays a static informational card explaining that users are authenticated via Internet Identity and managed on-chain.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, persist them to sessionStorage, and remove sensitive parameters from the URL hash without reloading.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Inter, Outfit), OKLCH-based semantic color tokens, teal/navy palettes, custom shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins enabled.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for CampusVoice tracking schema version, existing features, and a pending feature request (AR-1) to replace the backend department seed data with a full grouped list of 40+ academic departments across five faculties.
